purpose: Canonical small query corpus for memory-rollout tuning and regression checks, kept file-first and easy to diff.

baseline_position.authoritative_backbone: PostgreSQL + metadata filters + FTS + pg_trgm, with vectors later and conservatively
baseline_position.mempalace_role: pilot-evaluation shell relative to the baseline, not source of truth

query_families.expected_intent: retrieve the canonical rollout-plan artifact directly
query_families.bounded_expectation: top1 or stable top3 presence for the rollout-plan artifact

query_families.expected_intent: find the baseline architecture split and supporting recommendation artifacts
query_families.bounded_expectation: top results include task #99 and at least one supporting architecture artifact

query_families.expected_intent: retrieve the bounded MemPalace evaluation path relative to the baseline
query_families.bounded_expectation: top results include task #98 and baseline-relative pilot framing

query_families.expected_intent: resolve a slug-heavy artifact query without relying on semantic paraphrase
query_families.bounded_expectation: top1 or stable top3 presence for the exact slug artifact

query_families.expected_intent: retrieve the activation milestone artifact and nearby retrieval-stabilization follow-ups
query_families.bounded_expectation: top results keep task #107 visible and milestone intent stable across local/DB modes

query_families.expected_intent: retrieve the main activation milestone despite generic phrasing
query_families.bounded_expectation: task #107 remains top1 or within stable top3 depending on retrieval mode

query_families.expected_intent: find the verification chain for incremental ingest behavior and DB parity repair
query_families.bounded_expectation: results include both the parity gap discovery and the bounded repair verification

query_families.expected_intent: retrieve the backlog-cut artifact that follows phase-1 stabilization
query_families.bounded_expectation: future tuning should find the backlog-cut artifact directly once present
